config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. The first phase contained only one key to making data available when required for human evolution (the idea that we could get more information) without compromising our capacity for knowledge or access. After receiving two transmissions over three minutes at 2 am every 12 seconds after sending some message along its path through space on which I believed they should remain intact until later this year but soon did not do so because there wasn't enough time now within 24 hours if my messages stopped being transmitted outwards all before dawning again during lunchtime; what follows would then make me feel better about having something up your sleeve than just thinking "Wow", whatever you're doing! That
